scripts.start: docker compose down && docker compose up --force-recreate
scripts.install-all: npm ci && cd ./backend && npm ci && cd ../frontend && npm ci
scripts.push-image:frontend: cd ./frontend && docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 -t us-east1-docker.pkg.dev/{{ GCP_PROJECT_ID }}/app/frontend:latest --push . && cd ../
scripts.push-image:backend: cd ./backend && docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 -t us-east1-docker.pkg.dev/{{ GCP_PROJECT_ID }}/app/backend:latest --push . && cd ../
scripts.terraform:init: cd ./terraform && terraform init && terraform apply -target=google_artifact_registry_repository.app && cd ../
scripts.deploy: npm run terraform:init && npm run push-image:frontend && npm run push-image:backend && npm run terraform:apply
